fieldMapping.hint: Tell the AI what to put in each field of your card template. Leave a field blank to let the AI decide.

cloze.previewAlt: Preview: each card hides one line of the list
cloze.caption: 5 lines become 5 cards — each hides one

textColor.label: Text color
textColor.description: Sets the text color on your generated cards. Default follows Anki's theme, so it stays readable in light and night mode.

textAlign.label: Text alignment
textAlign.description: Sets the text alignment on your generated cards. Default keeps the template alignment — pick Left to match your Notion prose.

fontSize.label: Font size
fontSize.description: Controls the base font size in your generated cards. Range: 10–100 px.
